tasks.label: Backup to Google Drive
tasks.detail: Stage all, commit, and push — triggers the backup workflow automatically
tasks.command: git add -A; git commit -m '${input:commitMessage}'; git push

tasks.label: Restore from Google Drive (full)
tasks.detail: Triggers full pull workflow, waits for completion, then auto pulls — type YES to confirm overwrite
tasks.command: gh workflow run pull-from-gdrive.yml --ref main --field confirm=YES; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $runId = (gh run list --workflow=pull-from-gdrive.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId'); gh run watch $runId --exit-status; git pull

tasks.label: Pull Changed Files (ITERATE)
tasks.detail: Auto-detects mode — pulls only ITERATE changed files if manifest exists, otherwise full pull (requires YES confirmation)
tasks.command: gh workflow run pull-from-gdrive.yml --ref main; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $runId = (gh run list --workflow=pull-from-gdrive.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId'); gh run watch $runId --exit-status; git pull
